articles.description: San Quentin Rehabilitation Center officials said Friday that a suspected hantavirus case involving a 38-year-old male inmate has been ruled out after state testing determined the initial result was a false positive. The housing area was decontaminated as a precaution.

articles.title: One dead after crash on northbound I-15 near Levan; NB I-15 closed
articles.description: LEVAN, Utah (ABC4) — Northbound I-15 is closed near milepost 210, near Levan, due to a crash. One person was airlifted from the scene, and police have confirmed that they have died from their injuries. According to the Utah Department of Transportation, there is a crash on northbound I-15, leading to closures around milepost 206. [...]

articles.title: Austin man accused of sexually motivated break-ins at three West Campus apartments
articles.description: An Austin man, with a lengthy criminal record that includes more than a dozen charges related to sexual offenses, is accused of breaking into three West Campus apartments near the University of Texas during a three-hour period Wednesday morning, allegedly exposing himself, masturbating in front of victims and, in one case, attacking and strangling a woman after she awoke to find him in her room, according to court records.

articles.title: Ebola cases in DR Congo rise to 689, death toll reaches 139
articles.description: KINSHASA, June 12 (Xinhua) -- The number of confirmed Ebola cases in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has risen to 689, including 139 deaths, according to the latest situation report released on Friday by the country's health authorities.
